suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet 0/1 status and PTC fix implementation
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 0 was targeted for mid-April and had critical bugs (Lighthouse exits, Prysm FCU issues). PTC fix decision was deferred to March 24 ACDT but outcome not reported. This is blocking progress to DevNet 1.
Target was mid-April before Interop. As of today (April 13), this deadline is imminent. Need confirmation of readiness across ePBS, BALs, and other Glamsterdam components.

suggestions.topic: BAL DevNet status and SFI consideration
suggestions.rationale: BAL DevNet 2 SFI was scheduled for discussion on ACDE March 26, with implementation still ongoing across CL clients (Nimbus, Teku, Grandine). Status update needed before Glamsterdam DevNet 0.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API implementation and redesign scope
suggestions.rationale: PR 764 showed significant blob performance gains but sparked debate about shipping SSZ transport immediately vs full Engine API redesign. ELs requested semantic fixes (FCU bundling, deterministic validity). Decision needed for Glamsterdam timeline.

suggestions.topic: EIP-4788 parent hash backfilling under ePBS
suggestions.rationale: 4788 will have gaps for empty payloads under ePBS. Stokes was tasked with contacting Lido, Rocketpool, and EigenLayer on impact analysis. Update needed on protocol preferences and proof complexity.
ACDC #176 mentioned proposal window opens after EL headliner decision (expected last week). EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold) was proposed as candidate. Need to formally open CFI process.
Lighthouse nearly done, Prism in review, Lodestar debugging as of Feb 5. Can deploy pre-Amsterdam with progressive rollout. Update on implementation completion across clients.
ACDC #173 stated ePBS cannot ship without partial slot proofs in all clients. DevNet launched with Lighthouse/Prism, but Teku, Lodestar, Nimbus completion status unclear.
